subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Name through which the Bayán was sent down in remembrance and praise thereof, to protect me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک باسمک الذی نزل البیان فی ذکره و ثنائه بأن تحفظنی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
